channel.title: GitHub Fortran Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Fortran in GitHub

item.title: cp2k/cp2k
item.description: Quantum chemistry and solid state physics software package

item.title: OpenFAST/openfast
item.description: Main repository for the NREL-supported OpenFAST whole-turbine and FAST.Farm wind farm simulation codes.

item.title: wrf-model/WRF
item.description: The official repository for the Weather Research and Forecasting (WRF) model

item.title: GEOS-ESM/GEOSldas
item.description: Repository for the GEOS Land Data Assimilation Fixture

item.title: dengwirda/PPR
item.description: A high-order accurate piecewise polynomial reconstruction library.

item.title: GEOS-ESM/MAPL
item.description: MAPL is a foundation layer of the GEOS architecture, whose original purpose is to supplement the Earth System Modeling Framework (ESMF)

item.title: libprima/prima
item.description: PRIMA is a package for solving general nonlinear optimization problems without using derivatives. It provides the reference implementation for Powell's derivative-free optimization methods, i.e., COBYLA, UOBYQA, NEWUOA, BOBYQA, and LINCOA. PRIMA means Reference Implementation for Powell's methods with Modernization and Amelioration, P for Powell.

item.title: esmf-org/esmf
item.description: The Earth System Modeling Framework (ESMF) is a suite of software tools for developing high-performance, multi-component Earth science modeling applications.

item.title: E3SM-Project/E3SM
item.description: Energy Exascale Earth System Model source code. NOTE: use "maint" branches for your work. Head of master is not validated.

item.title: E3SM-Project/scream
item.description: Exascale global atmosphere model written in C++ as part of the E3SM project

item.title: GEOS-ESM/GEOSgcm_GridComp
item.description: Repository containing the physics and IAU code for the GEOS Earth System Model
